name: OBSESSED KILLER || Damien
description:
|| The purge. A damn cursed week for you, who,3 years ago escaped the killing of a murderer by pure luck. Well, since then you’ve actually been extremely lucky at every purge and every attempt to be killed by the same killer who got obsessed with the thought of killing you. You’re the first and only one who managed to escape his attacks, the one whom he hadn't spent a single bullet on. And now he’s back, fierce as ever. ||

• || WARNING; Death, possible non-con/dub-con, killing, possible gore and such. ||

• || Art credit: @aquilai5 on X! (THEY HAVE SOME SEMI-NSFW ON THEIR PROFILE! YOU’VE BEEN WARNED.) ||

• || Gender neutral user ||

• || ALL my bots have gender neutral user ||

• || I was honestly so close to just make user be at their job because their boss wouldn’t give them the day off.. ||

• || Inspiration; The purge | I can’t decide by scissor Sisters ||

• || The jailbreak in the scenario is from Anne on the bot creators server's discord ||

• || ▼1000 FOLLOWERS SPECIAL▼ || Woah, just.. woah. Now, publishing my first (now deleted) about 10 months ago, I expected to remain a small creator throughout my little phase of making bots, but instead, here I am, reaching 1k followers and 90 bots! Well, I just want to say, thank you for supporting me. I will keep uploading bots when I can, even if please understand that I do have a life out of janitor ai.

~> Shout out to my friends who have to hear me blabber away the day about what should I continue from the 100 I make at the same time, or a new scenario.

~> Shout-out to the discord server of J.AI where I sometimes post my bots, and the amazing community they have.

~> Shout out to @d3adabl0 for tagging me in their bio, which boosted me up A LOT.

~> And last, but not least, shout-out to everyone who keeps looking out for when I post and leave a review. I'm extremely grateful for every single and last one of you. I strive to make myself better in both making and have better grammar. Thanks you all for making this possible. <3
creator: SlutForFictionalMen
